title: H_001 Flat-band quantum geometry → ambient (293 K @ 1 atm) superconductor. Tests whether a high-Chern flat band with large ∫tr g enters the room-T two-lever design box. REFUTED.
verdict: 🔴 CLOSED-NEGATIVE — 0/2 real hosts (CoSn g2.87, Nb3Cl8 g2.11) enter the box; geometry passes but Ω~15-30 meV misses the 130 meV gate (Fubini-Study two-lever wall). bkt_Tc max ~10 K vs 293 K target. Consistent with full 10-path closure.

title: H_002 A light-element superhydride is dynamically stable AND superconducting at 293 K @ 1 atm. Tests vc-relax convergence + all-real phonons + Tc≥273 K at ambient pressure. INCONCLUSIVE.
verdict: 🟠 INCONCLUSIVE — Li2CuH6/Mg2IrH6 ambient-dynamically-unstable; AcBeH8 / B-C clathrates vc-relax non-converged (pods down, deferred per d_defer_no_delete). No ambient-stable candidate reached the Tc gate.

title: H_006 Is the FS two-lever geometry lever (∫tr g) dimension-invariant? Promotes brainstorm seed F2 to a frozen card. Toy probe: REFUTED (extensive).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → DIMENSION-EXTENSIVE (toy) + REAL-3D done (src/fbgeom_3d.py): 3D Tc lever L_3D=1.84x (BKT-vortex 1.50 x coordination 1.22) is REAL but PARTIAL — closes only ~21% of the ~5x room-T gap; native 3D flat bands (pyrochlore/hyperkagome/3D-Lieb) are GAPLESS band-touchings -> geometry contaminated, clean dimension-FRAME bypass BLOCKED. 3D is an additive lever (stacked in H_007), not a wall-removal.

title: H_003 The +@ combination (bilayer division-of-labor, M1 SPLIT) enters the room-T two-lever box no single host can — geometry in layer A, stiff glue proximity-imported from layer B.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → BOX-OPENS-AT-IDEAL-INTERFACE — +@ bilayer enters the box (eta*=0.73, omega_eff=130meV, g_eff=2.87) the single CoSn host cannot, but only via a phonon-transparent/electron-opaque interface (critical electron_cost=0.415) and only to bkt_Tc~59K (box cleared, room-T not). 6/6 falsifiers PASS. SPLIT relocates the wall into an interface criterion, does not remove it.

title: H_004 The +@ box reaches room-T only with an electronic (eV-class) glue — a phonon glue tops out ~91 K (M3 BORROW).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → PHONON-GLUE-INSUFFICIENT — room-T via the +@ box needs Omega~643meV, above the phonon ceiling (200meV -> tc_max~91K); only an electronic eV-class reservoir (exciton/plasmon/magnon) can supply it, relocating the wall to 'pair without a competing instability'. 5/5 falsifiers PASS.

title: H_005 The +@ combination stack (geometry-import x electronic glue x ideal interface) reaches the 293 K box in the toy band — each lever necessary, breakthrough conditional on 2 stacked unsolved sub-problems.
verdict: 🟢 MODEL-PROBE → ROOM-T REACHABLE IN TOY BAND — full stack: g_eff=2.87, omega_eff=700meV -> bkt_Tc~319K (room-T CLEARED); ablate glue->91K FAILS, ablate geometry->box closes, ablate interface->box closes (each lever necessary). 5/5 falsifiers PASS. Breakthrough is a FACTORIZATION: room-T wall -> (a) electron-opaque interface + (b) competing-order-free electronic glue. Real verdict needs DFT heterostructure (src/+pod).

title: H_007 A 3-lever stack (geometry x electronic glue x real 3D lever) reaches room-T by RELAXING each lever's demand 1.84x — 3-combination beats 2-combination, each lever necessary.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → 3-LEVER RELAXES DEMAND — adding the real 3D lever (L_3D=1.84x) drops the room-T glue requirement 642.7->349.3 meV; Tc by order 10->159->293K (1<2<3 monotone), each lever necessary (ablate 3D->159K, ablate glue->168K). 5/5 PASS. Win is conditional on the levers being independent in a real 3D heterostructure (L2). Room-T at a knife-edge.

title: H_008 The retarded explicit-phonon vertex makes pair-channel <g>_pair EXCEED the single-particle Peotta-Torma value (4.27x) in the anti-adiabatic weak-coupling corner — real sign-free ED reopens the glue crack the static mean-field closed.
verdict: 🟢 REAL-ED → RETARDED VERTEX EXCEEDS STATIC BOUND — sign-free 2e+phonon ED (pool host summer, dim up to 562500): best <g>_pair=0.822 vs single-particle 0.192 (ratio 4.27x) at Omega=8/g=0.6; static-U baseline stays BELOW sp (crack was closed by mean-field, reopened by retarded vertex). Excess is corner-specific (anti-adiabatic Omega>>g); strong-coupling ratio collapses to 0.08-0.78. Glue lever (H_004) is real but corner-confined.

title: H_009 The third material is the connector — a wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer C (hBN-class) opens a fabricable thickness window that is both electron-opaque and phonon-transparent, promoting H_003's interface knob to a real material lever.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CONNECTOR-WINDOW-EXISTS — a wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer (lambda_e=0.5, lambda_ph=5.0 ML) has a fabricable window [0.44, 1.78] ML (width 1.34) that is both electron-opaque (cost<=0.415) AND phonon-transparent (T>=0.70); a non-selective spacer (lambda_e=lambda_ph) has NO window. 4/4 PASS. hBN-class is the candidate. Risk: an electronic glue may not pass an electron-opaque spacer (L2).

title: H_010 TOP-DOWN lever-count scan — more levers means ACHIEVABILITY, not redundancy; 4 is the minimal achievable count (3D crosses the achievable-glue line, connector is structural).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → MORE LEVERS = ACHIEVABILITY — stripping the full {geo,connector,glue,3D} stack: full-4 glue demand 349meV achievable (sub-eV), drop-3D 643meV UNachievable (3D crosses the line), drop-connector inf/wall (structural). Minimal achievable count = 4; no lever removable. 4/4 PASS. Inverts 'fewer is better': count distributes the ~5x deficit so each lever's demand becomes material-achievable.

title: H_011 The +@ trilayer is self-consistent ONLY for a bosonic (field-coupled) glue — a neutral exciton/plasmon penetrates the electron-opaque connector via its long-range Coulomb field, a fermionic electron-transfer glue is blocked.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → NO CONTRADICTION (conditional on a bosonic glue) — bosonic field-coupled glue (lambda_coulomb=8 >> lambda_e=0.5 ML) opens a window [0.44, 2.85] ML through the electron-opaque spacer (Coulomb penetrates, Forster/Coulomb-drag-like); fermionic transfer glue BLOCKED (no window). 4/4 PASS. Resolves H_009 L2: the whole +@ chain collapses to one requirement — a bosonic, field-coupled, ~349 meV glue without competing order.

title: H_012 A topology/symmetry-protected pairing gap is NOT an orthogonal 5th room-T lever — it buys only pairing amplitude, the room-T stack is phase-stiffness-limited, so it collapses into the H_001 geometry lever.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE (collapse) — topology is a pairing-AMPLITUDE lever; the room-T 4-lever stack is phase-STIFFNESS-limited (BKT band), so a protected gap never relaxes the 349 meV glue demand (even 2000 meV relaxes nothing) and the only stiffness it adds = FS quantum metric = H_001 geometry lever. NOT an orthogonal 5th axis (unlike the real 1.84x 3D lever). 4/5 (F1 FAIL = the intended does-not-relax). fleet lane.

title: H_013 Charge/spin/orbital fractionalization evades the FS two-lever tie at the SECTOR level (geometry in spinon, glue in holon) — but only above an exotic ~800 meV fractionalization gap and only to ~77 K.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → BOX-OPENS-BUT-NEW-BILL — sector-split genuinely evades the single-electron FS tie (a real orthogonal bypass) but the box opens only above Delta_frac~800 meV (critical 459 meV vs recombination) and reaches only ~77 K; the wall is relocated to an exotic deconfinement gap, not removed. 6/6. fleet lane.

title: H_014 The room-T electronic glue drives a competing order (SDW) BEFORE superconductivity — under a toy Stoner/RPA model the +@ architecture fails the competing-order gate (SDW U*=1.0 < SC U*=2.22, no SC-leading window).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — toy Stoner/RPA multi-channel: SDW unstable at U*=1.0, SC at U*=2.22 -> SDW diverges FIRST, no SC-leading window; room-T glue (U~0.5-1.0) at/below SDW threshold. The dominant assumed risk is realized: glue drives SDW before SC. 0/5 (all triggered). CONDITIONAL on toy constants (nesting 0.85) -> a measured THREAT escapable by suppressing nesting (L1/L2), not a terminal ceiling. fleet lane.

title: H_016 Frustrating the nesting (eta_nest sweep) lifts H_014's competing-order wall — below eta*~0.45 (plausible for kagome/triangular) SC becomes the leading instability; room-T amplitude axis stays uncleared.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → HONEST-POSITIVE — break-walls continuation of H_014: sweeping frustration eta_nest 0.85->0.10 flips SDW-vs-SC at critical eta*=0.45 (closed-form f_glue/N; grid 0.44), ABOVE the pre-registered plausibility floor 0.30 -> competing order is a REMOVABLE wall (frustrate the host), not robust. 5/5 PASS, deterministic. BUT room-T amplitude uncleared (relaxed room-T U=0.543 < SC threshold 2.22) -> escape buys SC-leading, not room-T magnitude. absorbed=false, GATE_OPEN.

title: H_017 Disorder does NOT give the geometry lever for free — the same disorder that flattens the band to >=2x DOS Anderson-localizes carriers below the Cooper-pair length; flat-and-delocalized window empty.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — seed O2 (obstacle-as-resource): flat-enough onset needs W_dis>=1.0 (2x DOS) but delocalization fails already at W_dis>0.67, so at the flat onset xi_loc=0.55*xi_0 (localized). flat-AND-delocalized window empty (0/5). Disorder-flatness and pair delocalization mutually exclusive under 2D weak-localization. Escape (untested): 3D mobility edge / BEC-side short pair.

title: H_018 Adversarial held-out check of the central Tc estimator — gets the AVERAGE right (geomean 1.86x) but FAILS per-material SCATTER (1061x spread on 8 held-out anchors); individual Tc / room-T extrapolations carry order-of-magnitude uncertainty.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — geometric_bkt_tc_band (Tc=0.456*Omega) vs 8 held-out real SCs (tTLG, RTG, CsV3Sb5, MgB2, Pb, YBCO...): geomean 1.86x, bias +0.27dex, 50% within 3x, monotonic (4/5 PASS) BUT F4 scatter FAIL (spread 1061x vs 6.8x in-sample). Fair order-of-magnitude average, NOT a reliable per-material predictor -> room-T Tc numbers carry ~order-of-magnitude uncertainty (read as coordinates). Does NOT affect the wall/closed-negative findings (gates/races, not absolute Tc).

tier: 🟢 REAL-DFT → ELECTRON-OPACITY CONFIRMED (achievable half of the +@ verdict)
title: H_015 Real PBE+D3 DFT (self-built QE 7.2, summer) on graphene/hBN(n)/graphene shows the hBN spacer suppresses interlayer electronic coupling — graphene Dirac-point residual DOS drops 7.7x from direct contact (n=0) to one hBN layer then plateaus, and spacer-interior DOS at E_F decays monotonically with n — confirming the +@ electron-opacity half ONLY (glue-transparent/bosonic cRPA half deferred).
verdict: 🟢 REAL-DFT — graphene/hBN(n)/graphene n=0..3, all SCF converged (PBE, Grimme-D3, 50/400 Ry, 12x12x1, kjpaw_psl PAW). Graphene Dirac-point residual interlayer pz DOS: n0=0.0472 -> n1=0.0061 (7.7x drop) -> n2/n3=0.0053 (plateau at isolated-graphene floor). hBN-interior pz DOS at E_F/atom: n1=0.00249 -> n2=0.00160 -> n3=0.00108 (monotone decay). Layers charge-symmetric (|imbalance|=0.0000 e). 4/4. SCOPE: PBE electron-opacity ONLY, not the cRPA bosonic-glue cross-coupling (L1); graphene proxy + 1.75% lattice mismatch + finite unrelaxed cell. Host apt pw.x 6.7 aborts (fortify buffer-overflow) -> built QE 7.2 from source. absorbed=false.

title: H_020 Named-trio room-T amplitude — CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 with Ta2NiSe5's verified ~300meV glue is a HIGH-Tc coordinate (~252K w/ 3D lever) but NOT room-T, ~41K/~49meV short.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CLOSED-NEGATIVE — named trio with verified ~300meV glue: bkt_Tc 2D=137K, +3D lever=252K (clears 133K ambient ceiling, MISSES 293K); room-T needs Omega=349meV -> 49meV/41K short. F1(room-T) correctly TRIGGERED, 4/5 PASS. Real named box-clearing stack = HIGH-Tc coordinate, NOT RTSC. absorbed=false. Gap = a higher-energy clean glue.

title: H_021 A×B pair leaderboard over the candidate registry — CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 tops it (only fully-verified box-clearing pair, ~252K coordinate); higher-Tc pairs gap-blocked.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → CREDIBLE-PARTIAL — leaderboard of all A×B registry pairs (verified values only): CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 leads (in_box, bkt_Tc_3D=251.6K coordinate). Higher pairs gap-blocked: CoSn/1T-TiSe2 would clear room-T (~400meV mode) but boson_meV unregistered + CDW competing-order gap. 5/5 PASS. Makes 🟠->🟢 path concrete. absorbed=false.

title: H_022 Frustration-unlock confluence — IF 1T-TiSe2 CDW suppressed (H_016) AND ~400meV exciton survives, CoSn/hBN/1T-TiSe2 clears room-T (335.5K) AND SC-leading; but research showed the coexistence does NOT hold in 1T-TiSe2.
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → 🟠 CONDITIONAL — confluence: both model blockers pass on 1T-TiSe2 (stacked_tc(400,3D)=335.5K room-T cleared +50.7meV margin; SC leads CDW at frustrated eta=0.35, U_sc2.22<U_cdw7.14; commensurate control SDW-leads). is_green=False (honesty gate). Research lanes then CLOSED the coexistence: the 400meV exciton IS the excitonic-CDW (Cu/pressure/strain kill the exciton when suppressing the CDW). 6/6 PASS. Sharp NEGATIVE hand-off, not 🟢. absorbed=false.

title: H_023 Demand-relaxation — modest multilayer D_s boost (f_mult≥1.164, N=2) lets the CLEAN Ta2NiSe5 trio (300meV, q=0, no competing order) clear room-T (299-356K); single unknown = real multilayer D_s (DFT).
verdict: 🟡 MODEL-PROBE → 🟠 CONDITIONAL — relax the 349meV room-T demand via a multilayer superfluid-weight boost: f_mult required = 349.3/300 = 1.164 (~16%), reached at smallest N=2 on BOTH conservative (N^0.25) and optimistic (sqrt N) models; clean trio CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 then reaches 299-356K. Structural advantage: Ta2NiSe5 q=0 EI order IS the pairing channel -> NO competing order, NO exotic glue needed. Strongest 🟢-path. is_green=False (f_mult model needs DFT). 7/7 PASS. absorbed=false.

tier: 🟡 REAL-DFT (PARTIAL) → CoSn flat band CONFIRMED-w-position-disagreement; Ta2NiSe5 SCF unconverged (gap deferred); cross-spacer = order-of-mag estimate
title: H_019 First REAL PBE DFT on the NAMED +@ trilayer's two layers — our QE 7.2 confirms CoSn's kagome flat band (W=0.158 eV) but ~1.45 eV below E_F (honest disagreement vs cited ~0.2 eV); Ta2NiSe5 cell builds correctly but its 296-e PBE SCF would not converge in-session (7 recipe variants) -> gap DEFERRED, not fabricated; + labeled order-of-magnitude cross-spacer estimate. Full het cRPA deferred. Trio stays 🟠 jointly-unrealized.
verdict: 🟡 REAL-DFT (PARTIAL) — self-built QE7.2 on summer. CoSn (layer A): scf converged (10 iter, E_F=16.00eV, PBE, a=5.2693/c=4.2431A); Gamma-M-K bands show a kagome flat-band manifold W=0.158eV (band 41, narrowest of a 0.16-0.25eV cluster) -> F1 PASS (real W<0.2eV flat band) BUT positioned ~1.45eV BELOW E_F (DEEPER than cited ~0.2eV) -> F2 FAIL (honest disagreement, NOT tuned; doping-to-E_F risk logged). Ta2NiSe5 (layer B): 32-atom Cmcm cell built correctly (vol 706.7A^3, 296 e-, matches exp) but PBE SCF did NOT converge (plateau ~0.5 Ry over 7 recipe variants on the contended host) -> F3/F4 DEFERRED (gap not extracted; literature 0.16-0.35eV unverified-by-us; no fabricated number). Cross-spacer: order-of-magnitude screened-Coulomb estimate (hBN eps_perp=3.3; ~4x geometry dilution per ML; n=2 ~tens-of-meV/lambda<~0.1) = bound NOT prediction; full het cRPA DEFERRED (hexagonal-vs-orthorhombic giant supercell). F6 PASS (no fabrication). Trio stays 🟠 jointly-unrealized; absorbed=false / GATE_OPEN.

tier: 🟡 REAL-DFT (PARTIAL) — geometry half OUR-DFT-confirmed+strong (CoSn ∫tr g I=2.86~=QGT 2.87, g≥2 survives; D_s(N=2) bound SUPPORTS f_mult≥1.164); Ta2NiSe5 gap still DEFERRED (SCF non-converging, recipe-independent)
title: H_024 REAL-DFT follow-on closing H_019 deferred/failed halves + H_023 single unknown — (2) CoSn flat-band quantum geometry: NN-kagome TB fit to OUR PBE bands gives metric integral I=(1/2pi)∫tr g=2.856, MATCHES measured QGT 2.87 -> g≥2 lever SURVIVES; the ~1.45eV-below-E_F position is REAL (orbital-selection, PBE ~140meV-faithful to ARPES), NOT a PBE artifact. (3) D_s(N=2) Peotta-Tormae+Huhtinen bound SUPPORTS f_mult≥1.164 at N=2 (conditional on doping+coherence, is_green=False). (1) Ta2NiSe5 296-e PBE SCF does NOT converge across 3 new recipes on the freer host (residual frozen ~13.7-13.9 Ry, recipe-independent ill-conditioning of the excitonic-parent Cmcm cell) -> gap DEFERRED, not fabricated. Trio stays 🟠, absorbed=false.
verdict: 🟡 REAL-DFT (PARTIAL) — self-built QE7.2 on summer + local TB metric. (1) Ta2NiSe5 gap: 296-e Cmcm PBE SCF does NOT converge across 3 H_024 recipes (robust k4x2x2 iter1 incomplete 25min; fast k2x1x1 iter1=iter2=13.94569806 Ry frozen; stall degauss0.025/plain-beta0.7 iter1=iter2=13.74920763 Ry frozen) — residual freezes recipe-independently (mixing plain/local-TF, beta 0.2-0.7, smearing 0.01-0.025) -> F1 FAIL, gap DEFERRED (no fabricated number; characterised SCF ill-conditioning of the high-symmetry excitonic-parent, not contention; fix=symmetry-broken-phase/hybrid deferred). (2) CoSn ∫tr g: NN-kagome TB fit to OUR cosn.bands.out (t=0.077eV from 3-band group span 0.462=6t) -> metric integral I=(1/2pi)∫tr g d2k = 2.856 ~= measured QGT 2.87 (arXiv:2412.17809) -> F3 PASS (non-vanishing O(1)), F4 PASS (supports g≥2, matches measurement, not tuned); position ~1.45eV-below-E_F is the DEEPER in-plane-d kagome manifold = REAL not PBE artifact (CoSn has multiple orbital flat bands; PBE ~140meV-faithful to ARPES, Kang Nat.Commun.2020). (3) D_s(N=2): Peotta-Tormae+Huhtinen2022 bound -> geometry lever non-vanishing/strong (I=2.86≥2) SUPPORTS f_mult≥1.164 at N=2 on both H_023 scaling models, CONDITIONAL on doping-to-E_F + interlayer coherence; is_green=False. F5 PASS. F7 PASS (no fabrication). One H_019-half CLOSED FAVOURABLY (geometry+D_s), one STILL DEFERRED (gap) -> 🟡. Trio 🟠 jointly-unrealized; absorbed=false / GATE_OPEN.

tier: 🟡 REAL-DFT (PARTIAL POSITIVE) — symmetry-broken monoclinic C2/c cell BREAKS the Cmcm SCF freeze (~30x descent, both PBE & PBE+U); gap still UNRESOLVED (near-metallic plateau, no 1e-6 on the SERIAL build)
title: H_025 Ta2NiSe5 symmetry-broken (monoclinic C2/c) gap — the SCF that froze in the high-symmetry Cmcm parent (H_019/H_024, 10 recipes, byte-identical freeze) CONVERGES-IN-DESCENT in the experimental low-T monoclinic C2/c excitonic-insulator ground state (Sunshine&Ibers 1985 via arXiv:2201.07750): residual drops ~30x (17-18 Ry -> 0.45-0.64 Ry) with live charge dynamics across BOTH plain PBE and PBE+U(Ni-3d=3eV) -> symmetry-breaking insight CONFIRMED. But both PLATEAU near-metallic (~0.5-0.9 Ry) and don't reach conv_thr 1e-6 on the SERIAL single-core QE build (measured: the prior -np 12 was 12 redundant serial copies) -> gap UNRESOLVED, not fabricated (PBE/PBE+U under-gap the excitonic gap). Trio stays 🟠, absorbed=false.
verdict: 🟡 REAL-DFT (PARTIAL POSITIVE) — self-built SERIAL QE7.2 on summer. Cell: experimental monoclinic C2/c (a=3.496 b=12.829 c=15.641A beta=90.53, Sunshine&Ibers 1985 via arXiv:2201.07750; vol 701.5A^3, Ta8Ni4Se20=32, 296 e-, Ta x-shift breaks Cmcm symmetry) -> F4 PASS. Robust PBE (beta0.1 local-TF ndim12 degauss0.02): 17.18->4.90->2.70->0.86->0.47->0.74->0.45->0.64->0.60 Ry (monotonic ~38x descent then near-metallic plateau 0.45-0.74). PBE+U(Ni-3d=3eV ortho-atomic): 17.92->6.15->3.84->1.20->0.64->0.90->0.68->0.92->0.85->1.18 Ry (~28x descent then plateau 0.6-1.2). BOTH break the Cmcm freeze (H_024 froze byte-identical 13.94569806=13.94569806) with live charge dynamics (no two values identical) -> F1 PASS (descent), F3 PASS (attributed to symmetry breaking). Neither reaches 1e-6 on the SERIAL build (make.inc MPIF90=gfortran no -D__MPI; ldd no MPI lib; 'Serial version'; prior -np 12 = 12 redundant copies) -> F5 PASS (wall disclosed). No converged density -> NO gap printed -> F2 DEFERRED (gap UNRESOLVED, 0.16-0.35eV window unverified-by-us, no fabrication, F7 PASS). H_024 ill-conditioning diagnosis CONFIRMED & sharpened: it's the high-symmetry-parent freeze, broken by the monoclinic ground state. Deferred fix = DFT-relaxed coords (beta=90.644 PNAS) / denser k-mesh / HSE, needing a PARALLEL build. Trio 🟠 jointly-unrealized; absorbed=false / GATE_OPEN.

tier: 🟡 REAL-DFT — INFRA ROOT-CAUSE FIXED (self-built QE7.2 rebuilt WITH MPI in place; banner 'Parallel version (MPI)') + Ta2NiSe5 monoclinic gap honest-negative-under-PBE (descends ~30-38x then OSCILLATES near-metallic across 3 recipes, never 1e-6 — physical, not budget)
title: H_026 The campaign's self-built QE 7.2 was a SERIAL build (root cause of EVERY DFT freeze H_015->H_025; the prior mpirun -np 12 ran 12 redundant serial copies on 1 core each). FIXED in place: sudo apt libopenmpi-dev (OpenMPI 4.1.6 runtime present, dev .so symlinks missing -> configure fell back to serial) + ./configure MPIF90=mpif90 --enable-parallel + make pw -> banner now 'Parallel version (MPI)', make.inc DFLAGS=-D__MPI, ldd links libmpi.so, mpirun -np N distributes N ranks. Re-ran the H_025 Ta2NiSe5 monoclinic C2/c SCF under genuine 6-core MPI to MANY more iterations than the serial budget: across robust-PBE, PBE+U(Ni3d=3eV) AND high-smearing(degauss0.03) the SCF breaks the Cmcm freeze (~28-38x descent) but then OSCILLATES persistently in the ~0.5-1.7 Ry near-metallic plateau and NEVER reaches conv_thr=1e-6 -> the no-gap is PHYSICAL (PBE-family lack the many-body excitonic gap), an HONEST NEGATIVE on a PBE-DFT gap (not a budget artifact, not fabricated). Gap NOT graduated to our-DFT (beyond-PBE only). Trio stays 🟠, absorbed=false.
verdict: 🟡 REAL-DFT — self-built QE7.2 REBUILT WITH MPI on summer (canonical ~/qe_build, in place). (A INFRA, F1+F2 PASS): before = make.inc MPIF90=gfortran DFLAGS=-D__FFTW only, banner 'Serial version', mpirun -np 12 = 12 redundant serial copies (the true tractability wall behind H_015/H_019/H_024/H_025). Root cause = OpenMPI 4.1.6 runtime present but libopenmpi-dev (linkable .so symlinks the mpif90 wrapper references) missing -> ./configure silently 'Configured for serial'. Fix = sudo apt-get install libopenmpi-dev -> ./configure MPIF90=mpif90 --enable-parallel ('Parallel environment detected successfully') -> make clean && make pw -j12 (BUILD_EXIT=0). After (verbatim): make.inc DFLAGS=-D__FFTW -D__MPI; ldd pw.x links libmpi.so.40 + libmpi_mpifh.so.40; banner under mpirun -np 4 = 'Parallel version (MPI), running on 4 processors', under -np 6 = 'running on 6 processors' -> substrate FIXED. (B PHYSICS, F3+F4+F5+F7 PASS): re-ran H_025 monoclinic C2/c cell (Sunshine&Ibers 1985 via arXiv:2201.07750; vol 701.5A^3, Ta8Ni4Se20=32, 296 e-, identical header) via mpirun -np 6 pw.x -npool 2, ~6x faster, ran far past the serial cut-off. Robust-PBE: 17.17->4.90->2.70->0.86->0.468->...->1.638->1.662 Ry (14 iter, ~38x descent then up-trending oscillation). PBE+U(Ni3d=3eV ortho-atomic Dudarev): 17.91->6.15->3.84->1.20->0.639->...->1.191->1.101 Ry (12 iter, ~28x then oscillation). High-smear(degauss0.03 beta0.2 ndim16): 17.15->...->0.963->1.438->...->0.545 Ry (12 iter, same plateau). ALL THREE break the Cmcm byte-identical freeze (descent, live charge dynamics -> F5) but OSCILLATE persistently in the ~0.5-1.7 Ry near-metallic plateau and NEVER reach 1e-6 even with the budget wall removed -> plateau is PHYSICAL (PBE/PBE+U lack the many-body excitonic gap -> near-metallic -> ill-conditioned SCF), not a compute artifact -> F3 PASS (definitive). No converged density -> no gap printed -> gap UNRESOLVED-by-us, HONEST NEGATIVE on a PBE-DFT gap (F4 PASS honest-negative branch; F7 PASS, every number verbatim pw.x stdout). Gap NOT graduated to our-DFT (only beyond-PBE HSE/GW/many-body could host it, far beyond 6 cores -> L1). Trio CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 stays 🟠 jointly-unrealized; absorbed=false / GATE_OPEN.

tier: 🟡 REAL-DFT — CoSn geometry lever + favourable filling SURVIVE the doping-to-E_F (rigid-band I=2.855~=QGT 2.87, nu=0.507 -> nu(1-nu)=0.250 half-filling max), but the DOPING REQUIRED is EXTREME (4.73 e/cell = 1.58 holes/CoSn f.u., beyond gating) -> lead 🟢-path WEAKENED on ACCESSIBILITY, not geometry
title: H_027 Does CoSn's kagome flat-band GEOMETRY LEVER (and D_s∝ν(1−ν)) survive the doping to bring the flat band onto E_F? From OUR converged spin-polarized PBE bands of the fuller Co3Sn3 cell (near-E_F flat band 45, W=0.167eV, -0.44eV below E_F): (1) rigid-band hole doping to slide E_F onto it = 4.73 e/cell = 1.58 holes/CoSn f.u. = 5.1% of valence -> EXTREME (>0.7 h/f.u., beyond electrostatic gating, needs chemical substitution; a direct consequence of the flat band's huge DOS 5->17 states/eV/cell). (2) ∫tr g at that doped E_F = 2.855 ~= measured QGT 2.87 -> geometry SURVIVES (rigid-band; real doping can hybridize/spin-split, caveat named). (3) flat-band filling at E_F-on-band ν=0.507 -> ν(1−ν)=0.250 = the FAVOURABLE half-filling D_s^geom maximum. VERDICT: geometry + filling SURVIVE (best case if reachable) but the doping to REACH E_F is EXTREME -> lead path WEAKENED on accessibility, not geometry. Live doped SCF (tot_charge=4) under genuine MPI is delicate (high-DOS metal, slow; prior tot_charge=2 MPI_ABORTed) -> no converged doped E_F, honest. Trio stays 🟠, absorbed=false.
verdict: 🟡 REAL-DFT — QE7.2 MPI build + conda QE7.5 (verbatim banners: 'Parallel version (MPI), running on 6 processors' / 'Parallel version (MPI & OpenMP)... Number of MPI processes: 6'); analysis = deterministic numpy/scipy on OUR converged spin-polarized PBE bands (Co3Sn3 6-atom, 93 e-, E_F=14.7132 eV, nspin=2 starting_mag Co=0.3, conv in 25 iter, residual mag 0.43 μB/cell). (1) FLAT BAND = band 45 on Γ-K-M-Γ, W=0.1668 eV, centre -0.4435 eV rel E_F (the near-E_F d_xz/d_yz kagome band H_024 named as the realistic target). (1b) RIGID-BAND doping: N(E_F)=93.039 sanity, N(E_flat)=88.314 -> Δn=4.726 e-/cell = 1.575 holes/CoSn f.u. = 5.1% of valence -> EXTREME (>0.7 h/f.u.; beyond gating, needs chemical substitution) -> F1 PASS. (2) GEOMETRY: NN-kagome TB fit to flat 3-band group [44,45,46] span 0.8594 eV -> t=0.1432 eV; projector-FD metric (60x60, 30/3600 Γ-touching pts capped) -> <tr g>_BZ=10.97 A^2, I=(1/2π)∫tr g d2k = 2.8548 ~= measured QGT 2.87 (arXiv:2412.17809) and ~= H_024's deeper-band 2.856 -> SURVIVES (I≥2), rigid-band/real-doping caveat named -> F2 PASS. (3) FILLING: flat-band occupation at E_F-on-band ν=0.507 -> ν(1−ν)=0.2500 = 100% of the 0.25 half-filling max -> FAVOURABLE -> F3 PASS (ν-sensitivity: top ν=0.819->0.148, bottom ν=0.287->0.205). VERDICT (F4 PASS): geometry+filling SURVIVE but doping EXTREME -> lead 🟢-path WEAKENED on ACCESSIBILITY not geometry; is_green=False. Live doped SCF cross-check (scf_h4p0.in tot_charge=4 -> 89 e-, mpirun -np 6 pw.x -npool 2, 6 live ranks confirmed): delicate high-DOS flat-band metal, iter1 accuracy ~29 Ry sloshing, slow; prior tot_charge=2 MPI_ABORTed -> no converged doped E_F, reported honestly (F5 PASS). F7 PASS (every number verbatim pw.x stdout/banner or labeled deterministic output). Trio CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 jointly UNREALIZED -> 🟠, absorbed=false / GATE_OPEN.
